question: How much total money did I spend on attending workshops in the last four months?
reasoning_summary: The question asks for total money spent on workshops in the last four months (2022-10-26 to 2023-02-26). Three workshops with costs fall within this period: writing workshop in Nov 2022 ($200), mindfulness workshop on Dec 12 ($20), and digital marketing workshop on Mar 15-16 ($500). However, the digital marketing workshop on Mar 15-16 is after the question date (2023-02-26), so it is excluded. The sum of $200 + $20 = $220.

required_slots.name: workshop attendance events with costs
required_slots.value: writing workshop Nov 2022 $200, mindfulness workshop Dec 12 $20, digital marketing workshop Mar 15-16 $500
